title: FAO webinar tackles food safety in emergency situations
content:
Experts from the Philippines, Turkey and Chile have shared experiences of how food safety was managed during national disasters.

Webinar panelists emphasized the need to reduce the risk of unsafe food causing added harm in already strained settings.
